# v1.0.1 release notes

Dashboard polish and hardware-driven fixes.

## What's new

- Added Wi-Fi status in the header, with a shortcut into Wi-Fi setup.
- Added a manual timezone picker from the clock.
- Added the historical `Build a new app` flow that created a project folder, wrote `ground-truth.md`, and opened a terminal there.
- Added Chromium to the app grid by default.
- Bundled the weather widget.
- Added tap-to-click support on touchpads.
- Renamed the resource label from `Live space` to `Storage`.
- Switched Wi-Fi and battery indicators to plain text so the header stayed stable on systems without emoji fonts.

## Historical notes for this release

- The historical release story still used the older dashboard wording from that version.
- The boot/install model was still the same as `v1.0.0`: live boot to try it, with an `Install to disk` path for keeping it.

## Verify download

```sh
sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS
```

You want to see `OK` next to the ISO name.
